parsed_output.justification: Mike claims to have been the Seer and saw a Werewolf and a Drunk in the center. Mitchell claims to have been the Robber and robbed Mike, effectively confirming Mike's starting role as the Seer. Mike suggests that since he saw one Werewolf in the center, there may still be another Werewolf among the players (implying two Werewolves in the game). Mitchell and Mike both conclude that Caitlynn is the most likely Werewolf based on her behavior and claims during the discussion.
